title: The Three Tasks
prose: The First Task turns out to involve actual dragons — four of them, one per champion, guarding a golden egg, and the whole stadium goes silent and then roars at once when Harry Potter's Hungarian Horntail nearly catches him against the stands before he out-flies it entirely.

The Second Task moves everyone down to the Black Lake in February cold, champions diving in after something the Merpeople are holding hostage below the surface — you catch a glimpse of Cedric Diggory surfacing with Cho Chang, and Harry surfacing last but earning extra points for staying behind to help another champion first.

The Third Task is a maze, grown tall enough on the Quidditch pitch to swallow every champion from view entirely, spectators left simply watching a hedge wall and waiting. When Cedric Diggory and Harry Potter emerge together, gripping the Triwizard Cup at the same moment in a dead tie neither seems to have expected — the stadium's cheer is the loudest sound you've ever been part of.

choices.label: Whatever else this year turns out to hold, the Tournament itself was thrilling.
